summary: Iteration 13 — Meet & Greet feature + admin meet_greet_fee + email swap + z-index fix verified. Backend: 15/15 pytest pass (4.30s). Frontend: critical flows confirmed via Playwright — MG toggle visibility logic, popover text, Service Type z-index over FleetPicker (all 7 options render and selectable), contact email swap. Could not visually verify the meet-greet-fee chip (+$25) without completing geocoded autocomplete selection — recommended for main-agent self-test.

integration_issues.flow: Meet & Greet fee chip (+$25 flat fee) on live quote
integration_issues.issue: Could not visually confirm [data-testid=meet-greet-fee] chip because the pickup/dropoff inputs are PlacesAutocomplete-driven and require selecting from the Google Places autocomplete dropdown to fire a real geocoded /api/quote call. Backend math is correct (verified via 15 pytest checks — +25.0 on Executive Sedan, S-Class, Luxury SUV). Recommend main agent self-test by manually typing SFO/hotel and selecting suggestions, then toggling Meet & Greet.

action_items: Main agent: visually self-test the +$25 meet-greet-fee chip on Fleet vehicles after toggling Meet & Greet on a real geocoded SFO→Four Seasons quote (backend logic confirmed, only the UI chip render is unverified).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~2000+ lines — strongly consider splitting into routers (admin, public, payments, settings) for maintainability.

_compute_quote_amount duplicates the meet_and_greet/surge/zone logic from quote_ride. Extract shared pricing pipeline to avoid drift between live-quote and checkout-amount math (already an existing concern, surfaced again by MG addition).
Settings model coerces missing keys with defaults — good. meet_greet_fee=0 will gracefully disable; clean.

Booking model has meet_and_greet:bool default False — backfill on existing docs is the responsibility of startup_seed (lines 1855-1880, not verified in this run but admin GET /admin/bookings does not 500 → ConfigDict(extra='ignore') handles old rows).
test_credentials: Admin: turonlimosupport@gmail.com / TuronAdmin@2025 (2FA bypass: insert challenge w/ bcrypt('123456') into db.admin_2fa_challenges, then POST /api/admin/verify-2fa)
seed_data_creation: Test booking with full_name='TEST_MG User' is created and then deleted as part of test_create_booking_with_mg_persists. No residual data. meet_greet_fee restored to 25.0 after the patch test (fixture-level finally).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 covered Meet & Greet flag end-to-end: quote math (+$25 only for Airport Transfer), admin settings.meet_greet_fee CRUD with live-quote reflection, BookingCreate persistence, regression sweep (contact, options, places, zones, surge, admin login 2FA gmail unchanged). z-index fix for Service Type dropdown verified — opens ABOVE FleetPicker with all 7 options clickable. Email swap verified in ContactForm (data-testid=contact-info-email shows support@turanelitelimo.com), PayBooking footer source (grep), index.html JSON-LD (grep), email_service SUPPORT_EMAIL default (grep). Only un-verified UI: live MG fee chip render — needs PlacesAutocomplete real selection.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defects found. All backend logic for Meet & Greet ($25 default, configurable, only Airport Transfer) works as designed. Email swap complete across frontend + backend. Z-index z-[200] on shadcn Select correctly layers Service Type options above the FleetPicker vehicle cards.
